title: GL-iNet MT6000
description: Real, sanitised capture from a live GL-iNet Flint 2 (MT6000). WireGuard and Tailscale were not active on this router, so those responses are hand-authored to exercise the code paths. wan_status/wan_speed are hand-authored from the sanitised registry signature (glinet-registry mt6000_4.9.0) with documentation-range addresses.
